docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PANG, CHRISTIANNE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-27-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO DEC-03-2019 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506. PARTIES DO NOT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR THIS MATTER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETERSON, CARRIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PANG, CHRISTIANNE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THAT LEAK TO WATERLINE IN DEFENDANT'S REFRIGERATOR WAS CAUSED BY NEGLIGENCE OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-03-2020
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY PETERSON, CARRIE AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, CHRISTIANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CARRIE PETERSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRITIANNE PANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S WITNESS STATE FARM BENITA SOLARE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
